name: Mahri Atamammedova
experience_summary: Mahri is currently a Computer Engineering student with significant hands-on project experience, including a full-stack AI-powered web application built with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Express. She demonstrates strong technical proficiency in Node.js backend development, MySQL database operations, and modern frontend technologies. She also holds an ongoing QA Tester role. However, she currently lacks documented professional software development experience of at least one year, as her listed 'Web Developer Intern' position dates (04/2025 – 06/2026) are in the future.
red_flags: The primary internship (WEB DEVELOPER INTERN – ENOCA) dates (04/2025 – 06/2026) are in the future, indicating that the candidate does not currently meet the 'at least 1 year professional or long-term internship experience' requirement. This needs clarification.

The candidate is still pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering (graduating in 2027), not yet graduated.
